content: vite-plugin-pwa v1.3.0 (May 2026) is the latest release. Requires Vite 7+ (v1.x) and Node 16+. Uses Workbox v7. The plugin automatically picks up Vite's base config option for service worker and manifest paths. Strategy 'generateSW' is the recommended default — auto-generates SW that pre-caches all static assets. For full offline: set workbox.globPatterns to '**/*' and includeAssets to '**/*'. Runtime caching via runtimeCaching array with handlers like CacheFirst. SW update via registerSW from 'virtual:pwa-register'. GitHub Pages with base: '/little-words/' works automatically — the plugin defaults its own base to Vite's base config.
